title: Tableau: Google Play Store Analysis
description: A summative data analysis project on a 40MB+ Google Play Store dataset. Cleans and preprocesses app metadata using pandas, then produces six Tableau-ready visualizations covering average rating by category, install volume trends, free vs. paid pricing model comparison, app size vs. rating correlation, installs by content rating, and paid app monetization patterns â€” framed as an investment decision analysis.
shortDescription: Pandas + Tableau EDA on Google Play Store data: ratings, installs, pricing, and monetization.
